summary: When the pybind reference path runs view/permute/contiguous and attention math directly on NPU tensors, correctness may fail with aclnnInplaceCopy and tiling_funcs NULL. Move the fallback computation inputs and weights to CPU inside python_bind_src, run the ATen attention/layer_norm logic there, and return the CPU result to avoid unsupported NPU copy/transpose execution in the custom-op fallback path.
